positive: A vibrant, stylized bohemian forest scene. Central composition featuring bioluminescent flora and ethereal forest animals (deer, fox, owl) interconnected by glowing, geometric vines. The palette emphasizes deep indigo, teal, emerald green, and touches of neon gold, creating a strong, mysterious contrast. Style is a blend of Art Nouveau illustration and modern vector geometry, ensuring clean lines and solid silhouettes. High contrast, maximalist yet balanced. Designed for a seamless apparel print, highly detailed but scalable.
negative: blur, smudged, abstract, photorealistic, low contrast, poor anatomy, extra limbs, watermark, text, signature, logo, jpeg artifacts, grain, noise, messy, cluttered
